ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Switch(ThisItem.'Shift Type', 
"Booking", 
With(
    {BookingRecord: LookUp(col_BookingsSchedule, BookingID = ThisItem.BookingID)
    },
If(IsBlank(LookUp(col_SiteInductions, 'Staff LookUp'.StaffID = varStaffViewID.StaffID && 'Site LookUp'.SiteID = BookingRecord.'Site LookUp'.SiteID && 'Induction Status' = "Completed")), 
true, false)))

Switch(ThisItem.'Action Type', 
"Site Induction", 

With( 
    { 
        wthInductionRecord: LookUp(col_SiteInductions, 'Staff LookUp'.StaffID = varStaffViewID.StaffID && 'Site LookUp'.SiteID = ThisItem.'Site LookUp'.SiteID && 'Induction Status' = "Completed")
    }, 
    "Site Induction Completed On: " & wthInductionRecord.'Created On' & "
    Site Induction Expires On: " & wthInductionRecord.'Expiry Date'), 

"Service", 


"Element: " & ThisItem.'Booking Element LookUp'.Element

)
LookUp(BESA_Activities, 'Shift GUID' = varActionRecord.'Shift ID').'Client LookUp'.'Client Name'

"Est. Total Hours: " & Coalesce(Sum(Filter(col_ShiftList, 'Technician GUID' = ThisItem.StaffID/*, 'Technician Name' = ThisItem.StaffName*/ && 'Shift Date' = dateEngineerSelectedView_1.SelectedDate), 'Estimated Duration'), 0)
"(" & CountRows(col_EngineerActionList) & ") Action List for : " & Text(dateEngineerSelectedView_1.SelectedDate, "dd dddd mmm, yyyy")

If(!IsBlank(ThisItem.'Shift Type'), "Shift:" & ThisItem.'Shift Type', 


Switch(ThisItem.'Action Name', 
"Service", ThisItem.'Booking Element LookUp'.Division & " - " & ThisItem.'Booking Element LookUp'.Service, 
ThisItem.'Action Name')
)

Switch(ThisItem.'Shift Type', 
"Booking", 
With(
    {BookingRecord: LookUp(col_BookingsSchedule, BookingID = ThisItem.BookingID)
    },

   "Site Induction: " & BookingRecord.'Site LookUp'.'Induction on Site Time'
))
"Service - " & varActionRecord.'Booking Element LookUp'.Division & " | " & varActionRecord.'Booking Element LookUp'.Service
"Service - " & varActionRecord.'Booking Element LookUp'.Division & " | " & varActionRecord.'Booking Element LookUp'.Service
"Service - " & varActionRecord.'Booking Element LookUp'.'Booking Service Lookup'.Division & " | " & varActionRecord.'Booking Element LookUp'.'Booking Service Lookup'.Division

ThisItem.'Action Status' = "Completed" &&
!IsBlank(ThisItem.'Booking Element LookUp'.'Order Service LookUp'.'Service LookUp'.'Test Type')
